records.question: Which parties with the Houseqlassics theme that started in 1999 and ended in 2010, held at Various locations, have at most 18 hosts and a main host in charge?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT party.party_id FROM party
JOIN party_host ON party.party_id = party_host.party_id
WHERE party.party_theme = 'Houseqlassics' AND party.first_year = '1999' AND party_host.is_main_in_charge = 'T' AND party.location = 'Various locations' AND party.number_of_hosts <= 18 AND party.last_year = '2010'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT party.Party_ID 
FROM party 
JOIN party_host ON party.Party_ID = party_host.Party_ID 
WHERE party.Party_Theme = 'Houseqlassics' 
AND party.First_year = '1999' 
AND party.Location = 'Various locations' 
AND party.Number_of_hosts <= 18 
AND party.Last_year = '2010' 
AND party_host.Is_Main_in_Charge = 'T'

records.question: Which parties held in Hemkade 48 Zaandam in 2000 had Austin Daye, a United States host, as the main person in charge?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT party.party_id FROM party
JOIN party_host ON party.party_id = party_host.party_id
JOIN host ON party_host.host_id = host.host_id
WHERE party.first_year = '2000' AND host.nationality = 'United States' AND party.location = 'Hemkade 48 Zaandam' AND party_host.is_main_in_charge = 'T' AND host.name = 'Austin Daye'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT party.Party_ID
FROM party
JOIN party_host ON party.Party_ID = party_host.Party_ID
JOIN host ON party_host.Host_ID = host.Host_ID
WHERE party.First_year = '2000'
  AND party.Location = 'Hemkade 48 Zaandam'
  AND party_host.Is_Main_in_Charge = 'T'
  AND host.Nationality = 'United States'
  AND host.Name = 'Austin Daye'

records.question: Which parties held in Various locations in 2010 have a main host who is in charge?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT party.party_id FROM party
JOIN party_host ON party.party_id = party_host.party_id
WHERE party_host.is_main_in_charge = 'T' AND party.location = 'Various locations' AND party.last_year = '2010'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT party.Party_ID 
FROM party 
JOIN party_host ON party.Party_ID = party_host.Party_ID 
WHERE party.Location = 'Various locations' 
AND party.Last_year = '2010' 
AND party_host.Is_Main_in_Charge = 'T'

records.question: Which parties at Hemkade 48 Zaandam have the Club Q-BASE theme, include Ed Davis (who is 45 years old, from the United States, and not the main host in charge), and have at most 23 hosts total?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT party.party_id FROM party
JOIN party_host ON party.party_id = party_host.party_id
JOIN host ON party_host.host_id = host.host_id
WHERE party.number_of_hosts <= 23 AND party.party_theme = 'Club Q-BASE' AND host.name = 'Ed Davis' AND party_host.is_main_in_charge = 'F' AND host.nationality = 'United States' AND host.age = '45' AND party.location = 'Hemkade 48 Zaandam'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT party.Party_ID 
FROM party 
JOIN party_host ON party.Party_ID = party_host.Party_ID 
JOIN host ON party_host.Host_ID = host.Host_ID 
WHERE party.Number_of_hosts <= 23 
  AND party.Party_Theme = 'Club Q-BASE' 
  AND party.Location = 'Hemkade 48 Zaandam' 
  AND party_host.Is_Main_in_Charge = 'F' 
  AND host.Name = 'Ed Davis' 
  AND host.Nationality = 'United States' 
  AND host.Age = '45'
